hero.titleLine2: keep docs and deployments on the platform.
hero.subtitle: For enterprise R&D: refresh docs on every push; trigger deploys from the web with traceable, interruptible runs and live logs.

capabilities.title: Two core capabilities
capabilities.lede: MVP focuses on “comments to docs” and “one-click deploy”: GitLab group fixed server-side; token in session; dedupe and timeouts enforced in the backend.

doc.label: Capability A
doc.title: Java comments to online docs
doc.desc: Pull incremental Java changes from GitLab, parse JavaDoc, persist structured records; traceable by project, branch, file, and commit.

deploy.label: Capability B
deploy.title: One-click build & deploy
deploy.desc: Backend runs script chains via PTY; logs stream over WebSocket; only one RUNNING task per commit at a time.

platform.label: Platform
platform.title: Vercel-like UX, enterprise constraints
platform.desc: Repo linking and build-log feedback inspired by Vercel; auth via session—no standalone login UI in this phase.

footer.line1: © {{year}} RepoPilot · Docs from comments · Traceable deploys

documentation.title: Documentation pipeline
documentation.lede: Turn source comments into structured online docs: GitLab triggers incremental updates; parse failures alert without blocking the main flow.

deploy.title: One-click deploy
deploy.lede: Trigger deploy tasks from the web; backend executes via PTY and streams logs over WebSocket; cancel and timeouts supported.
